cases.prompt: Create a DESIGN.md and a full design system for my new product

assertions.text: Understands the product, researches the landscape, and proposes a complete design system (aesthetic, typography, color, layout, spacing, motion).
Generates font and color preview pages for the user to choose from.
Creates DESIGN.md as the project's design source of truth.

cases.prompt: 브랜드 가이드라인이랑 디자인 시스템 처음부터 잡아줘

assertions.text: Proposes a complete design system covering aesthetic, typography, color, layout, spacing, and motion.
Produces a DESIGN.md as the persistent source of truth.

cases.prompt: 이미 운영 중인 사이트에서 디자인 시스템을 추론해줘

assertions.text: For existing sites, redirects to /plan-design-review to infer the system instead of creating from scratch.
